text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 390 

PRE_ICL_MOPP_COINS_2M 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Mail Order Preferred Pharmacy Coinsurance for 2-month supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a 2-month supply of the drugs on 
this tier, using mail order preferred pharmacy (MOPP; also known as a preferred mail order pharmacy 
within a split network) during the pre-initial coverage limit
